patients_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Patients/")
admissions_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Admissions/")
diagnosis_map_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Diagnoses_icd/")
diagnosis_ref_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/D_icd_diagnoses/")
insurance_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Insurance/")
doctors_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Doctors/")
departments_df = spark.read.format("delta").load("abfss://con-healthcare-proj@saazurepractice12.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/Departments/")

patients_df.printSchema()
